title: An Act to Designate Certain Bridges as Veterans Memorial Bridges
last_house_action: 2/4/2025 - The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 3/19/2026 - Pursuant to Joint Rule 310.3 Placed in Legislative Files (DEAD)

actions.description: Committee on TRANSPORTATION suggested and ordered printed REFERENCE to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION Ordered sent down forthwith for concurrence
The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on TRANSPORTATION . In concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
